case.title: YOUNG v. DIRECTOR, U.S. BUREAU OF PRISONS

opinion.h4: YOUNG v. DIRECTOR, U.S. BUREAU OF PRISONS, (1967)
opinion.h2: William H. YOUNG v. DIRECTOR, U. S. BUREAU OF PRISONS et al. No. 1317, Misc.
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed for want of jurisdiction.[ Young v. Director, U.S. Bureau of Prisons (1967) ]
